title: Tokusatsu Hero Instrumentality Project
description: It is a mod about adventure and Tokusatsu collection.In this mod,you can collect many kinds of materials,henshin to the Tokusatsu heros that you likes,such as ultraman ,kamen rider(masked rider) and super sentai.
body:
It is a mod about adventure and Tokusatsu collection.

In this mod,you can collect many kinds of materials,henshin to the Tokusatsu heros that you likes,such as Ultraman ,Kamen Rider(masked rider) and Super Sentai.

And when the night comes,it will be a lot of kaijus,kaijins and more creep monsters to visit you and fight with you,you should henshin to your own Tokusatsu hero and beat them,then get the speical materrials from their dead body to power up your heros.

For Godzilla,it will be add in the future with the most classical 1954 form,and the other Godzilla forms and famous kaijus like Anguirus will comes not now.

Now it is just a beginning,so it will be a lot of bugsin it.but don't worry about it,when we find them,we'll fix them by the first time.And We'll add more and more creatures in the future,unexpected  Tokusatsu heros and monsters will return by the new way.
Have fun!
